feed.title: 4chan
feed.subtitle: Newest threads from selected worksafe 4chan boards (news, g, o, tv, v, mu, vip) via the read-only JSON API, plus the official 4chan blog. Board posts are user-generated and unmoderated; each title is prefixed with its board.

entry.title: /int/ International: >The April 2011 Fukushima earthquake struck while Endo, then 10 years old, was i…
entry.content: >The April 2011 Fukushima earthquake struck while Endo, then 10 years old, was in class and heavily damaged her school. Her family and their homes survived, and they were not required to evacuate from the subsequent release of radiation at the Fukushima Daiichi Nuclear Power Plant; as she wasn't allowed to go outside, she continued to practice football inside her home, which contributed to her ability to handle the ball in confined spaces. >In a 2023 interview, Endo said that at the time she had

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: 24 years and no one has ever managed to figure out how the combat works, will we…
entry.content: 24 years and no one has ever managed to figure out how the combat works, will we ever find out? or are we doomed to just spam the attack button till hidden RNG mechanisms decide to work in our favor?

entry.title: /tv/ TV & Film: Pocahontas
entry.content: What can you expect from filthy little heathens? Their whole disgusting race is like a curse Their skin's a hellish red They're only good when dead They're vermin, as I said, and worse They're savages, savages Barely even human Savages, savages Drive them from our shore They're not like you and me Which means they must be evil We must sound the drums of war They're savages, savages Dirty shrieking devils Now we sound the drums of war

entry.title: /int/ International: 4chan exposed
entry.content: 4chan exposed Now that janitors and moderators have got so bad that they've removed the option to give moderation feedback on 4chan.org/support I might stop coming here entirely I've been on 4chan since about 2011 but if the moderators and janitors are deliberately fucking with users for their own sick amusement these days then I don't see the point in being here Is this website really just a front for crime and corruption?

entry.title: /trash/ Off-Topic: /slop/ - AI Slop and Image Generation Thread #2946
entry.content: >Sloppy Joe Edition Fapping-focused AIslop thread for those who enjoy plapping to AI thread perfection. A thread for prompters, editors, requesters, gooners, AI pornmommies, PLAPpers, Stable Diffusion directors, NovelAI artists—anything and everything AIslop. No limits past site rules; use Catbox galleries and uploads if needed. Keep dumps to a minimum and don't be a derailing cunt, thanks. Previous Thread: https://desuarchive.org/trash/threa d/83877741 >Scripts to check image metadata: rentry.o

entry.title: /int/ International: I don’t know who needs to hear this
entry.content: But I’ve just discovered that I’ve been attaching to people and things too quick, too excessive and too hard and it’s been making me feel extremely fragile, vulnerable, desperate and distressed. Also very manipulable and exploitable by people sensing my attachment issues i.e. psychos. To all my hyperattachment homies out there know that nothing is irreplaceable and feel free to detach yourselves from anything draining yo asses.

entry.title: /s4s/ Sh*t 4chan Says: The left tries to keep up the illusion of progress but its progress in ways that…
entry.content: The left tries to keep up the illusion of progress but its progress in ways that do not benefit people, just with words no actions. The right keeps up this illusion of tradition by instead not doing shit. Both use this divide to distract from the fact that both parties are just there to make the rich richer.

entry.title: /o/ Auto: Trying to fix some rust on my car. 2 questions: 1) What is the transparent foil …
entry.content: Trying to fix some rust on my car. 2 questions: 1) What is the transparent foil on the lower righthand corner of the right picture? If I remove it do I have to replace it or does it have no real purpose? 2) The rust spot on the left hand picture is on a texturized area, does that texture serve a purpose other than looks? Is there a way to replicate that texture or is it ok to just paint it over noramlly after grinding it down / welding a new piece of metal in?

entry.content: >no hme thred What is this? A board for people who drive some light vehicle 30 minutes per day? Disgusting behaviour. Do you operate heavy machinery 10+ hours per day? Tell us about it. Are you living the dream yet? Did the lv operators annoy you on your 1+ hours commute to work this morning? Are the foreign truck drivers saying yes when they mean >me no speaky da Engrish This is a thred for real auto enthusiasts not part timers. entry.title: /o/ Auto: I thought I didn't like screens and yeah they're kind of ugly when not integrate…
entry.content: I thought I didn't like screens and yeah they're kind of ugly when not integrated correctly, but then I actually used them and realized they're cool. Are you guys just seething because you're poor? When you actually drive new places regularly, unlike /o/ users who just go to work and home, it's actually helpful to have a large, bright google maps display and to answer calls on the go, change music, etc. If any of you have driven with young women (none of you have), you'll realize they want to co

entry.title: /trash/ Off-Topic: /flg/ - F-List General
entry.content: /flg/ - F-List General #8355 Flag Bikini Edition Previous Thread: >>83867189 F-list is a website for people interested in erotic roleplaying, and creating character profiles to find like-minded partners with similar interests and fetishes to roleplay with. It features a webchat (which can be used for textual roleplaying), group forums and more kinks and depravity than you can memorize. The purpose of this thread is to serve as a place where roleplayers can freely share and advertise their profil

entry.title: /s4s/ Sh*t 4chan Says: I could do drugs for the next 5-8 years and then just kill myself and then there…
entry.content: I could do drugs for the next 5-8 years and then just kill myself and then there is nothing to worry about because it ain’t the gonna be the sickness that kills me it ain’t gonna be the feelings I have I’ll be too numb. And ain’t no one gives a single fuck so why not? It would be so kino. It’s hard not to think like that because I’m in the void I might as well embrace it

entry.title: /g/ Technology: Why is youtube so fucking heavy nowadays?
entry.content: CPU usage goes up to 50% even when playing short old low quality videos (even when scrolling through videos overloads my cpu), even some heaviest videogames I have aren't that demanding. What the fuck did they do with yt?

entry.title: /g/ Technology: Windows 11 solitaire has unskippable ads. You can pay a MONTHLY SUBSCRIPTION to …
entry.content: Windows 11 solitaire has unskippable ads. You can pay a MONTHLY SUBSCRIPTION to remove them. Not some tricky wordplay or bending of the truth on my part, just $1.99/mo and you get: removed ads from solitaire.

entry.title: /tv/ TV & Film: Need another show like this
entry.content: Just finished watching the last season today after going through the entire series while my wife was out of town for the week. I felt very melancholy as I was finishing the last finale. Any other shows like this even come close to its wit, charm or smarts? It was so far ahead of its time for exploring the space it did making it more relevant than when it finished

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: Is it really worth it to miss out on the biggest cultural event in gaming histor…
entry.content: Is it really worth it to miss out on the biggest cultural event in gaming history just to be a contrarian? People are talking about refinancing their home just so they can buy the game and a console to play it on, which may sound a bit absurd, but it's totally understandable

entry.title: /tv/ TV & Film: While this film was a critical and financial failure in its initial release in t…
entry.content: While this film was a critical and financial failure in its initial release in theaters, it made more than triple the cost of production in DVD and post-theater sales. Statistically, It is one of the most successful 'Friday the 13th' films. Despite initial negative critical feedback, over time it has become more popular among younger fans of the franchise, mainly for its self-deprecating humor and inventive death scenes.
